title: Get created item id after triggering Create an item in board
excerpt:

Dynamic mapping

posts.author: allanl (Allan)
posts.cookedHtml:
I am following the documentation in this link:

Using Inbound Mapping (your app to monday.com)
Dynamic mapping

I created a recipe with a custom trigger and the built in “Create an item in board” action. After calling the trigger, the item is created correctly with the inbound mapping. However, I am unable to retrieve the created item id. The response when calling the webhookUrl appears to be empty. Is it possible to get the created item id?

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello there @allanl,

As of today, you can not get that ID in the response you get when you call your custom trigger’s webhook URL. As a workaround, you can add a webhook in your board to listen to the creation of new items.

Would you like for me to turn this into a feature request?

Looking forward to hearing from you!

Cheers,
Matias

posts.author: dvdsmpsn (David @ David Simpson Apps)
posts.cookedHtml: Couldn’t you look in the activity log for a recently created item? If you know the details, likely you could narrow it down.

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml: That could also work! And the webhook would then not be necessary. Thank you @dvdsmpsn

posts.author: allanl (Allan)
posts.cookedHtml:
Thanks @dvdsmpsn. That could work but it can be inconsistent. I would have to make another query in my app backend. Also, the activity logs might not be updated yet. Then, I would have to introduce some sort of delay. It would be more convenient for me to just get the created id directly.

@Matias.Monday possible to turn this into a feature request? Thank you!
